{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220206272BD64E9B305D18F81A9B"}"},"total":89},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591038625695859480","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节基本合理，故事也有起伏，比不些脑残小说强多了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767459532,"group_id":"7553469235679202328","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/kFsY+AcFsv1oyZFCyjOqg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"103869701364","user_name":"用户10386970"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103869701364","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7553469235679202328","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生复仇+神豪系统+虐渣爽文】
顾时倾重生了。
上一世，她是被调换的豪门真千金，20岁被找回，却是让她替假千金嫁给双腿残疾的未婚夫周廷安。
为了给养母治病，她答应了。
但养母的病情还是恶化，没两年还是死了。
嫁给周廷安后，她尽心尽力的照顾他。
而他，却因为接受不了双腿残废的事情，性格暴戾，对她非打即骂。
周家还一起欺负她，拿她当保姆使唤。
她忍无可忍，一把火和他们同归于尽。
重生后，她绑定了巅峰系统，只要完成任务，就能走上人生巅峰。
既然都有巅峰系统了，那么她疯癫点怎么了？
重生第一件事，篡改亲子鉴定结果，不再和亲生家庭有任何关系。
重生第二件事，做任务获得百病丸，治好养母的癌症。
重生做第N件任务后，豪车豪宅，资产股份，身家千亿，妥妥的走上人生巅峰。
还有上一世欺辱她的那些人，没一个有好下场。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/916304b2761980eed0d4c63acace7efe","author":"乐小悠","author_id":"","book_id":"7553469235679202328","book_name":"重回认亲前，这真千金我不当了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":844,"name":"真假千金","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=844&name=真假千金&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7553469511685374488","read_count":"11937","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"711171"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"346","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,重生,虐渣,真假千金","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ed24480af068c3ce9b6496081d238612~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300387&x-signature=6voXoHsCOMdE53X6aGchYzMFIxk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4160170172355256","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"194"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220206272BD64E9B305D18F81A9B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"
